results.resolved_title: Regulation of expression and secretion of NleH, a new non-locus of enterocyte effacement-encoded effector in Citrobacter rodentium.
results.note: Paper characterizes NleH only in Citrobacter rodentium; calls NleH 'conserved among A/E pathogens' but makes no claim about the E. coli O157:H7 Sakai locus ECs0848. Homolog in a different organism.

results.resolved_title: Regulation of expression and secretion of NleH, a new non-locus of enterocyte effacement-encoded effector in Citrobacter rodentium.
results.note: Experimental subject is C. rodentium; no claim about E. coli O157:H7 Sakai locus ECs1814. Homolog in a different organism.

results.resolved_title: Regulation of expression and secretion of NleH, a new non-locus of enterocyte effacement-encoded effector in Citrobacter rodentium.
results.note: Experimental subject is C. rodentium; no claim about EPEC E2348/69 locus E2348C_0986. Homolog in a different organism.

results.resolved_title: Regulation of expression and secretion of NleH, a new non-locus of enterocyte effacement-encoded effector in Citrobacter rodentium.
results.note: Experimental subject is C. rodentium; no claim about EPEC E2348/69 locus E2348C_3233. Homolog in a different organism.

results.resolved_title: Regulation of expression and secretion of NleH, a new non-locus of enterocyte effacement-encoded effector in Citrobacter rodentium.
results.quote: NleH secretion and translocation into Caco-2 cells requires a functional T3SS
results.note: Paper's exact organism (C. rodentium), protein (NleH) and system (T3SS). Abstract via PubMed.

results.resolved_title: Analysis of human cytomegalovirus secondary envelopment by advanced electron microscopy.
results.note: Cited DOI resolves to a human cytomegalovirus electron-microscopy paper; makes no claim about Brucella abortus or any T4SS effector.

results.resolved_title: Analysis of human cytomegalovirus secondary envelopment by advanced electron microscopy.
results.note: Cited DOI is an HCMV virology paper; unrelated to Brucella abortus T4SS effectors.

results.resolved_title: Codon-usage-based inhibition of HIV protein synthesis by human schlafen 11.
results.note: Cited DOI resolves to a paper on human SLFN11 inhibition of HIV-1; makes no claim about Salmonella SseK or T3SS.

results.resolved_title: Codon-usage-based inhibition of HIV protein synthesis by human schlafen 11.
results.note: Cited DOI is an HIV/SLFN11 paper; unrelated to Salmonella SseK T3SS effectors.

results.resolved_title: Codon-usage-based inhibition of HIV protein synthesis by human schlafen 11.
results.note: Cited DOI is an HIV/SLFN11 paper; unrelated to Salmonella SseK T3SS effectors.

results.resolved_title: Mucispirillum schaedleri Antagonizes Salmonella Virulence to Protect Mice against Colitis.
results.note: Cited DOI resolves to a Mucispirillum/Salmonella colitis paper (wrong CHOM 2019 article); makes no claim about Edwardsiella piscicida EvpP or its T6SS.

results.resolved_title: Mucispirillum schaedleri Antagonizes Salmonella Virulence to Protect Mice against Colitis.
results.note: Cited DOI is a Mucispirillum/Salmonella colitis paper; unrelated to Edwardsiella piscicida T6SS components.

results.resolved_title: Mucispirillum schaedleri Antagonizes Salmonella Virulence to Protect Mice against Colitis.
results.note: Cited DOI is a Mucispirillum/Salmonella colitis paper; unrelated to Edwardsiella piscicida T6SS components.

results.resolved_title: A bacterial guanine nucleotide exchange factor activates ARF on Legionella phagosomes.
results.quote: Thus, RalF is a substrate of the Dot/Icm secretion apparatus.
results.note: L. pneumophila RalF; Dot/Icm = T4SS. Abstract via PubMed.

results.resolved_title: A bacterial guanine nucleotide exchange factor activates ARF on Legionella phagosomes.
results.note: Paper (Nagai 2002) is exclusively about RalF; VipF (lpg0589), a distinct Legionella effector, is not its subject. Mis-cited.

results.resolved_title: The TIR domain containing proteins BtpA and BtpB have a structural WxxxE motif important for protection against microtubule depolymerisation.
results.quote: a CyA reporter assay showed VirB-dependent protein transport into host cells, suggesting BtpA and BtpB may be substrates of the VirB T4SS
results.note: Full text names 16M BtpA (BMEI1674) as a VirB T4SS substrate in Brucella. BtpA = Btp1 = TcpB.

results.resolved_title: The TIR domain containing proteins BtpA and BtpB have a structural WxxxE motif important for protection against microtubule depolymerisation.
results.quote: a CyA reporter assay showed VirB-dependent protein transport into host cells, suggesting BtpA and BtpB may be substrates of the VirB T4SS
results.note: Full text: '2308 BtpA (BAB1_0279)' named as VirB T4SS substrate in B. abortus 2308. BtpA = Btp1 = TcpB.

results.resolved_title: Strains with Mutations in an Atypical Type I Secretion System Accumulate RTX Toxin Intracellularly
results.quote: RTX toxin is secreted by a four-component type I secretion system
results.note: V. cholerae RTX toxin (rtxA) secreted by T1SS. Abstract via PubMed full-text record.

results.resolved_title: Strains with Mutations in an Atypical Type I Secretion System Accumulate RTX Toxin Intracellularly
results.quote: RTX toxin is secreted by a four-component type I secretion system
results.note: Same V. cholerae RTX toxin secreted by T1SS. rtx (B5LMV1) is the RTX toxin entry.

results.resolved_title: Pathogen blocks host death receptor signalling by arginine GlcNAcylation of death domains.
results.quote: NleB, an enteropathogenic Escherichia coli (EPEC) type III secretion system effector known to inhibit host nuclear factor
results.note: NleB = NleB1 in EPEC E2348/69; T3SS effector. Abstract via PubMed.

results.resolved_title: Cleavage of Arabidopsis PBS1 by a bacterial type III effector.
results.note: Paper is about the P. syringae T3SS effector AvrPphB cleaving Arabidopsis PBS1; AvrPtoB (PSPTO_3087) is a different effector, not mentioned. Mis-cited.

results.resolved_title: Solving the mystery of H7N9 by crystal balls.
results.note: Cited DOI resolves to an influenza H7N9 commentary; makes no claim about Yersinia pseudotuberculosis YezP or any T6SS.

results.resolved_title: PelN Is a New Pectate Lyase of Dickeya dadantii with Unusual Characteristics
results.quote: the PL9 family, which already includes the secreted endopectate lyase PelL and the periplasmic exopectate lyase PelX
results.note: D. dadantii 3937. Abstract states pectate lyases incl. PelL are 'secreted in the extracellular medium by the type II secretion system, Out'.

results.resolved_title: Ehrlichia chaffeensis Uses Its Surface Protein EtpE to Bind GPI-Anchored Protein DNase X and Trigger Entry into Mammalian Cells
results.quote: We report a novel entry triggering protein ofEtpE that functions as an invasin
results.note: Right organism (E. chaffeensis) but the paper is about the surface invasin EtpE, not the T4SS effector TRP120 (ECH_0039), which is not mentioned.

results.resolved_title: Israeli acute paralysis virus: epidemiology, pathogenesis and implications for honey bee health.
results.note: Cited DOI resolves to a honey-bee Israeli acute paralysis virus paper; makes no claim about Legionella Ceg9 or T4SS.

results.resolved_title: Coxiella burnetii effector protein CvpF subverts RAB26-dependent autophagy to promote vacuole biogenesis and virulence
results.quote: CBU0626 is a novel member of the vacuolar protein (Cvp) family of effector proteins, which is translocated by the Dot/Icm secretion system
results.note: C. burnetii CBU0626 (renamed CvpF); Dot/Icm = T4SS. Body also: secretion absent in T4SS-defective mutant. Abstract via PMC full text.

results.resolved_title: BcsK Is an Essential Protein for the Type VI Secretion System Activity in Burkholderia That Forms an Outer Membrane Complex with BcsL
results.note: Only abstract retrievable (full text 403). Abstract is about T6SS machinery components BcsK/BcsL; effector EFF00353 (QU43_RS38250) not in retrievable text. Cannot positively confirm or refute.

results.resolved_title: IgA1-specific serine protease exhibits novel cleavage activity against IgG3
results.quote: As a member of the autotransporter protein family, IgA1Ps maturation involves several autoproteolytic cleavage steps leading to secretion of the approximately 100 kDa protease domain
results.note: N. meningitidis iga product (IgA1P) is a secreted autotransporter (T5SS); deletion mutant MC58 dela (NMB0700). Full text via PMC.
